channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: World ski body and UN weather agency team up to help winter sports plan for climate change
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — Facing a long-time crisis in winter sports because of climate change, the International Ski and Snowboard Federation teamed up with the United Nations weather agency on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Padres hold off Braves' comeback, earn another date with rival Dodgers in NLDS
item.description: For the third time in five years, the Padres and Los Angeles Dodgers will meet in the National League Division Series after San Diego's sweep of the Atlanta Braves in the wild card round.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mitchell hits tiebreaking HR in the 8th, Chourio goes deep twice and Brewers rally past Mets 5-3
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Jackson Chourio tied the game in the eighth with his second homer of the night and Garrett Mitchell delivered a two-run shot later in the inning to give the Milwaukee Brewers a 5-3 victory over the New York Mets on Wednesday that evened their NL Wild Card Series.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Higashioka's homer starts rally as Padres beat Braves 5-4 to sweep NL Wild Card Series
item.description: Kyle Higashioka’s solo homer started a five-run rally against Max Fried with two outs in the second inning, and the San Diego Padres held on to sweep the Atlanta Braves with a 5-4 win in Game 2 of their NL Wild Card Series.
item.dc:creator: Bernie Wilson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Democrat House candidate says women aren't worried about transgender athletes in their sports locker rooms
item.description: New Jersey congressional candidate Sue Altman says she and others in women's locker rooms are not worried about the presence of transgender athletes in their sports locker rooms.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gritty Tigers close out playoff sweep of Astros with 5-2 victory in Game 2 of Wild Card Series
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Manager A.J. Hinch wanted his Detroit Tigers to embody their home city. Hard-working with a never-give-up attitude, but most of all a team that had grit. That's how they stormed into October — and just kept going.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bucs remain banged up but carry confidence into Thursday's Falcons clash
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers are riding momentum into Thursday night’s NFC South clash with the Atlanta Falcons but so far, the short game week has presented many challenges.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mbappé can't rescue Real Madrid in Champions League loss to Lille
item.description: AP Sports Writer (AP) — Kylian Mbappé came off the bench but couldn't prevent defending champion Real Madrid from losing 1-0 at unheralded Lille in the revamped Champions League on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: JEROME PUGMIRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears' rookie Tory Taylor named NFC Player of the Week
item.description: Tory Taylor of the Chicago Bears was named NFC Special Teams Player of the Week for his performance in the team's victory over the Los Angeles Rams, with a 55.4-yard average and three punts landing inside the 10-yard line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Patrick Mahomes sees himself turning the corner amid a slow start, even as the Chiefs are 4-0
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Patrick Mahomes has been through self-described slumps before, including last year, when the Chiefs struggled so mightily late in the season that some were calling them a long shot to win another Super Bowl title.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alcaraz rallies past Sinner to win China Open and make it 3-for-3 against his top rival this year
item.description: BEIJING (AP) — Carlos Alcaraz won seven straight points in the decisive tiebreaker to beat top-ranked Jannik Sinner 6-7 (6), 6-4, 7-6 (3) and win the China Open on Wednesday, extending his recent mastery over his biggest rival — who is dealing with an ongoing doping case.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Second fan files lawsuit claiming ownership of Shohei Ohtani's 50-50 baseball
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — The claim to Shohei Ohtani's potentially lucrative 50th home run ball grew more complicated this week, with a second fan filing a lawsuit asserting he had possession of the historic baseball.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bay Area News Group high school football predictions: Week 6, 2024
item.description: The guys pick 15 games across the Bay Area, including Los Gatos at Pittsburg, Archbishop Riordan at St. Ignatius, Saratoga at Monta Vista, St. Francis at Archbishop Mitty, and more.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Jets' undisciplined play raises questions about head coach's leadership
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – We entered the season, and the sky was the limit for the Jets and expectations on the season. Four games in, and after a terrible 10-9 loss to the Broncos on Sunday, many things are being called into question.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: What to know about the Padres Wild Card Series at Petco Park
item.description: If you are heading to the game, here are some things to know about the best-of-three National League Wild Card Series matchup between the Padres and Atlanta Braves:
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Utah Jazz veterans hope to lead young core
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - There are no less than ten players 23 years of age or younger currently on the Utah Jazz roster. So for veterans like Jordan Clarkson, they know their role as leaders is invaluable.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Sitake wants to keep BYU hungry during bye week
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off a 34-28 win at Baylor, #17 BYU is 5-0 for the first time in three years. But head coach Kalani Sitake is going to make sure his team keeps its underdog mentality during the bye week. "That's our job," Sitake said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs prep for Falcons in Primetime TNF after big win over Eagles
item.description: After beating the Philadelphia Eagles the Tampa Bay Buccaneers now lead the NFC South with a 3-1 record.
item.dc:creator: C.H., WFLA, NBC

item.title: Giants fire Farhan Zaidi, Buster Posey named as replacement
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco Giants have parted ways with President of Baseball Operations Farhan Zaidi and named Buster Posey as his replacement.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: College GameDay makes first-ever appearance at Berkeley
item.description: (KRON) -- Since taking its show on the road back in 1993, "College GameDay" has been a huge presence in the college football community by being known to travel across dozens of campuses across the country.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Mayfield throws for 347 yards and accounts for three TDs to lead Bucs over Eagles 33-16
item.description: Baker Mayfield threw for 347 yards and two touchdowns, while Mike Evans became the Buccaneers' career scoring leader Sunday during Tampa Bay's 33-16 victory over the Philadelphia Eagles.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 2025 Club World Cup final to be at MetLife Stadium, site of 2026 World Cup final
item.description: Next year’s championship of the expanded Club World Cup will be played on July 13 at MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, New Jersey, site of the 2026 World Cup final.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: White Sox look to break Tigers' home win streak
item.description: Chicago White Sox (39-121, fifth in the AL Central) vs. Detroit Tigers (86-74, second in the AL Central) Detroit; Saturday, 1:10 p.m. EDT PITCHING PROBABLES: White Sox: Sean Burke (0-0); Tigers: TBD BOTTOM LINE: The Detroit Tigers, on a five-game home winning streak, host the Chicago White Sox.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Reds bring 4-game losing streak into matchup against the Cubs
item.description: Cincinnati Reds (76-84, fourth in the NL Central) vs. Chicago Cubs (82-78, second in the NL Central) Chicago; Saturday, 2:20 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Former BYU track and field sprinter dies in mountain biking crash
item.description: A former Brigham Young University track and field sprinter died Wednesday afternoon after a tragic mountain biking accident, according to a university press release.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Former NBA MVP Derrick Rose announces retirement
item.description: Derrick Rose's last act as an NBA player came in the form of a letter to the game of basketball, addressing the highs and lows that he experienced over a 16-year pro career. And with that, his career ended on his terms. Rose, the No.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KTLA 5
